summary: AI voice generation and speech synthesis platform.
editor_note: The surprising thing is not that voice cloning works. It is that 30 seconds of audio can already get you something commercially usable. ElevenLabs is betting this becomes infrastructure for dubbing, audiobooks, and accessibility, not just a viral demo. That is a narrower and more durable business than AI voice as spectacle.
why_featured: Voice AI that actually sounds human
tags: voice ai,speech synthesis,text to speech,artificial intelligence
investors: Andreessen Horowitz, Nat Friedman, Daniel Gross

product_evidence.claim: Official product positioning describes ElevenLabs: AI voice generation and speech synthesis platform.
It is that 30 seconds of audio can already get you something commercially usable.
